ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "full_school_name" TEXT /* Full name of the school */,
  "school" TEXT /* Short name of the school */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "adj_rpi" REAL /* Adjusted RPI (Ratings Percentage Index) of the team */,
  "division" INTEGER /* Division level of the team (e.g., 1 for Division I) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., Mens, Womens) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the school is located */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head coach of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home stadium of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "full_conference_name" TEXT /* Full name of the conference */,
  "division" INTEGER /* Division level of the conference (e.g., 1 for Division I) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference's official website */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conference record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Win Rate, Points Scored) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the metric was recorded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., basketball, football) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sport */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the stadium */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stadium record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stadium record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)
